title: An Act establishing a special commission to study access to unemployment insurance in the Commonwealth

abstracts.abstract: By Representatives Luddy of Orleans and Tarsky of Needham, a petition (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Hadley Luddy for an investigation by a special commission (including members of the General Court) to study access to unemployment insurance.  Labor and Workforce Development.

actions.description: Referred to the committee on House Rules
